funFacts: Harbor Seal basking on Rocks sleep both on land and in the water, sometimes floating vertically like a bottle while dozing.
Harbor Harbor Seal basking on Rocks are excellent divers, capable of holding their breath for up to 30 minutes and diving to depths of 1,500 feet.
